name: Luma Ray3
description: Luma Ray3 - reasoning model; natural language works; Draft Mode for iteration, Master for final 4K HDR
examplePrompts: A woman stands alone on a rainy train platform at night. She lights a cigarette, the flame briefly illuminating her tired eyes. She exhales slowly as a train rushes past in the background. Dramatic rim lighting from the train's headlights. Shallow depth of field, 35mm film aesthetic.
The character enters the room, pauses at the doorway, then walks to the window and opens the curtains. Soft morning light floods in. Cinematic composition, photorealistic.
Studio Ghibli style, a cat chases a paper airplane through a sun-drenched meadow, camera follows at ground level, gentle breeze rustling tall grass, painterly watercolor aesthetic.
